response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While her experience aligns well with the technical stack (TypeScript, cloud platforms), her AI/GenAI expertise is less explicitly detailed than required for a Staff-level role. Her leadership in developer tooling and open-source contributions suggests potential for technical leadership, but further validation is needed.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq.
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentorship, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (focus appears more on full-stack/web).
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance metrics in resume.
Lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI/computer science, which are preferred qualifications.
